name: [BUG-SF-007] TC-SF-013 — GET /api/v1/fetch/status with Accept: application/xml returns 500 (must be 406)
description:
**[KNOWN BUG — BUG-SF-007]**

**What this test does:**
Sends GET /api/v1/fetch/status with "Accept: application/xml" to test content negotiation. The service only produces application/json, so it should return 406.

**Expected:** HTTP 406 Not Acceptable
**Actual:** HTTP 500 Internal Server Error

**Root Cause:** HttpMediaTypeNotAcceptableException is not handled globally, so it surfaces as a generic 500 instead of a proper 406 response.

**Impact:** API clients that specify Accept: application/xml (common in enterprise integrations) receive a misleading 500 error rather than a clear 406 that would tell them to use application/json instead.
descriptionHtml:
[KNOWN BUG — BUG-SF-007]

What this test does:
Sends GET /api/v1/fetch/status with "Accept: application/xml" to test content negotiation. The service only produces application/json, so it should return 406.

Expected: HTTP 406 Not Acceptable
Actual: HTTP 500 Internal Server Error

Root Cause: HttpMediaTypeNotAcceptableException is not handled globally, so it surfaces as a generic 500 instead of a proper 406 response.

Impact: API clients that specify Accept: application/xml (common in enterprise integrations) receive a misleading 500 error rather than a clear 406 that would tell them to use application/json instead.
